long_description:
[COM] [ZONAL] - Memory Usage over 95% by host in mzone726:dal2-qz1-sr2-rk225-s40 is Triggered 

TIP Runbook URL: https://pages.github.ibm.com/cloudlab/internal-docs/sysdig_high_memory_usage_in_node.html
TIP Short Description: [ZONAL] dal2-qz1-sr2-rk225-s40 in mzone726 is using more than 95% of memory for the last 10 minutes
TIP Situation: Zonal host high memory usage
TIP Console: toc
TIP CRN: crn:v1:::is-genctl:::mzone726:host:dal2-qz1-sr2-rk225-s40

Event Generated:

Severity:         High
Metric:
    ((sum by (agent_tag_cluster,host)(sysdig_host_memory_used_bytes{agent_tag_cluster=~"^mzone.*|.*prod.*|.*ngdc.*"}) / sum by (agent_tag_cluster,host) (sysdig_host_memory_total_bytes{agent_tag_cluster =~ "^mzone.*|.*prod.*|.*ngdc.*"})) *  100) > 95 = 95.0115
Segment:
    agent_tag_cluster = 'mzone726' and host = 'dal2-qz1-sr2-rk225-s40'

Time:             12/01/2025 02:33 PM UTC
State:            Triggered
Notification URL: https://us-south.monitoring.cloud.ibm.com:443/api/oauth/openid/IBM/910302c05d5e49f791b39ccad7167b2b/31cd1241-2f66-4bbc-ae24-1fd27bd261a5?redirectRoute=%2Fevents%2Fnotifications%2Fl%3A2419200%2F179247072%2Fdetails

------

Type:         Prometheus
Name:         [COM] [ZONAL] - Memory Usage over 95% by host
Description:  [ZONAL] Host is using more than 95% memory for the last 10 minutes
Team:         Monitor Operations

    Everywhere
Alert When:   ((sum by (agent_tag_cluster,host)(sysdig_host_memory_used_bytes{agent_tag_cluster=~"^mzone.*|.*prod.*|.*ngdc.*"}) / sum by (agent_tag_cluster,host) (sysdig_host_memory_total_bytes{agent_tag_cluster =~ "^mzone.*|.*prod.*|.*ngdc.*"})) *  100) > 95
Duration: 10 m
